zh.Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾其斯同
zh.Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾卻斯特頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Goode於大約1505年出生在英國時，他的父親William Goode IV42歲，母親Dame Millicent Whitby32歲。他於1520年6月23日與Joan Whitston在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年11月25日在英國越可爾惠特比享年61歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾其斯同。

zh-hans.Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰可瓦爾其斯同
zh-hans.Chesterton, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾卻斯特頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Goode于大约1505年出生在英国时，他的父亲William Goode IV42岁，母亲Dame Millicent Whitby32岁。他于1520年6月23日与Joan Whitston在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年11月25日在英国越可爾惠特比享年61岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾其斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Goode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Good  . This name has been used in Ireland since the 16th century.
Possibly an Americanized form of Dutch   Goede  .

variants.name: Good
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English gode ‘good’ (Old English gōd).

English: from the Middle English personal name Gode, representing either Old English Goda (male) or Gode (female), in part a byname and in part a short form of various compound names with the first element gōd, or perhaps a pet form of Old French names in God- such as Godfrey .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gut and Guth , or Dutch Goed and Goede .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Goode was born about 1505, in England, his father, William Goode IV, was 42 and his mother, Dame Millicent Whitby, was 32. He married Joan Whitston on 23 June 1520, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 November 1565, in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Whitstone, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Goode est né environ 1505, à Angleterre, son père, William Goode IV, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Dame Millicent Whitby, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan Whitston le 23 juin 1520, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1565, à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Whitstone, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Goode um 1505 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Goode IV 42 und seine Mutter Dame Millicent Whitby 32. Er hat am 23. Juni 1520 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Joan Whitston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. November 1565 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Whitby, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Whitstone, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Goode è nato il circa 1505 nel England, il suo padre, William Goode IV, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Dame Millicent Whitby, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan Whitston il 23 giugno 1520, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 novembre 1565, nel Whitby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Whitstone, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Goodeが約1505年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Goode IVは42歳，母Dame Millicent Whitbyは32歳であった。1520年6月23日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでJoan Whitstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年11月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーで61歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルウィトストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Goode(이)가 대략 1505년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Goode IV(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Millicent Whitby(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1520년 6월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Joan Whitston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 11월 25일 영국 요르크실르 휘트비에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 휘츠톤에 묻혔다.

mn.Whitstone, Cornwall, England, United Kin: Whitstone, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Goode nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Goode IV, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Dame Millicent Whitby, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Whitston em 23 de junho de 1520, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1565, em Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Whitstone, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Goode родился около 1505 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени William Goode IV было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Dame Millicent Whitby, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Whitston 23 июня 1520 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 ноября 1565 г. в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности уицтоун, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Goode nació aproximadamente 1505, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Goode IV, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Dame Millicent Whitby, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan Whitston el 23 de junio de 1520, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1565, en Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Whitstone, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
